generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transmitting rotational torque from motor to mechanical axis with positional accuracy of ±0.1 mm"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Actuator [
    base:desc "High-precision cycloidal gearbox component in the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 robot subsystem"
    base:isContainedIn RobotFirstAxisEnvironment
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance PrimaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted directly on the permanent magnet synchronous motor for precise angular position tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData, AngularPositionData
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder positioned behind the gearbox to reduce backlash and improve positional uncertainty estimation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionData
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Torque sensor integrated in the motor-gearbox subsystem for real-time torque measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DerivedTorqueData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryEncoder
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PrimaryEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance FrictionlessSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing frictionless behavior of the motor-gearbox subsystem (Fig. 4a)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction characteristics for the gearbox subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing Stribeck friction behavior with velocity-dependent hysteresis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Dahl friction characteristics with wear compensation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model using LuGre friction model for dynamic friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink dynamics model computing output torque/velocity from input parameters using manufacturer-specific parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor current data streamed via MQTT protocol from primary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredAngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time angular position data from primary encoder streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Gearbox position data from secondary encoder streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from motor current and system dynamics model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SINUMERIKController
]

instance SimulatedReferenceData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Reference output data (motor, gearwheel, system) from frictionless simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData FrictionlessSystemModel
]

instance SimulatedFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Friction-influenced outputs derived from Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre simulation models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel
]

instance MetadataTraceability : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Metadata containing source tracing (sensor channel, model origin) for traceability of data points"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredMotorCurrentData, MeasuredAngularPositionData, SimulatedReferenceData
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLBlockDefinition : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) for structural modeling of first axis (motor, gearwheel, cycloidal gearbox)"
]

instance SysMLInternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for behavioral modeling of rotational/torque flows between components"
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital twin Asset Administration Shell (AAS) for contextualizing physical components and their interconnections"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink environment for executable friction models and system dynamics simulation"
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (motor current, angular position)"
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller for robot control and torque/current processing"
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "UML-based Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) structuring data traces, models, and processing components"
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time integration of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models for dynamic control adjustment"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionLossMonitoring
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionAnalysis, ModelOptimization
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of live sensor data, simulated friction models, and deviations between measured/simulated outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataComparisonVisualization, DeviationAnalysis
]

instance MultiPhysicsAwarenessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction losses (static, kinetic, viscous) using simulation models and data-driven processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossMonitoring, AccuracyEnhancement
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeFrictionAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of static, kinetic, and viscous friction losses in the gearbox/motor subsystem in real-time"
]

instance ModelOptimization : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models to improve robot motion accuracy (reducing positional errors by up to 30%)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataComparisonVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured vs. simulated data traces (torque/velocity) to identify deviations and operational anomalies"
]

instance DeviationAnalysis : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated analysis of visualization data to flag operational anomalies and friction-related errors"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionLossMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction losses using simulation models and real-time sensor data"
]

instance AccuracyEnhancement : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Implementation of optimized control algorithms to enhance robot motion accuracy through friction compensation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, CycloidalGearbox,
        PrimaryEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, TorqueSensor,
        FrictionlessSystemModel, CoulombViscousFrictionModel,
        StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel,
        SystemDynamicsModel, MeasuredMotorCurrentData,
        MeasuredAngularPositionData, MeasuredGearboxPositionData,
        SimulatedReferenceData, SimulatedFrictionData,
        MetadataTraceability, SysMLBlockDefinition,
        SysMLInternalBlockDiagram, AssetAdministrationShell,
        MATLABSimulink, MQTTProtocol, SINUMERIKController,
        DigitalShadowReferenceModel, FrictionIdentificationService,
        VisualizationDashboardService, MultiPhysicsAwarenessService
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency)** with the following operational frequencies:
  - **Sensor data acquisition**: Continuous streaming of motor current (*I_M*) and angular position via MQTT.
  - **Friction model updates**: Dynamic exchange of friction models (white-box/black-box) during operation, synchronized with live measurements (e.g., torque/velocity traces) at sub-second intervals.
  - **Dashboard visualization**: Real-time aggregation and comparison of data traces (e.g., reference vs. simulated outputs) for immediate operational insights."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **centralized and purpose-driven**, focusing on the **first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot**. It integrates:
  - A **single digital shadow** (FrictionShadow) for friction analysis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for structuring physical components.
  - **Live data processing** (MQTT) and **simulation models** (MATLAB Simulink) to enable real-time friction identification and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As designed (ideal)**: Structural and behavioral models (SysML BDD/IBD) define the robot’s first axis architecture, including motor-gearbox interactions.
  - **As manufactured/operated**: Real-time integration of live sensor data (MQTT) and friction models (MATLAB Simulink) to dynamically improve motion accuracy during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data points to their sources (e.g., sensor channel, model origin) for transparency.
  - **Model validation**: Comparison of simulated frictionless and friction-influenced outputs against live measurements (torque/velocity traces).
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Use of dual encoders (motor/gearbox) to reduce positional uncertainty and backlash effects.
  - **Continuous learning**: Dynamic exchange of white-box/black-box friction models to adapt to operational changes (e.g., wear, tooling)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time sensor data streaming (motor current, position).
  - **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) for structural and behavioral representation of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for organizing physical components and their interconnections.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for executable simulation models (frictionless/friction-influenced behavior)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows:
  - **SysML** for structural/behavioral modeling (BDD/IBD).
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for data trace and model organization (UML-based).
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data communication.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for simulation modeling."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system ensures safety by:
  - **Passive digital shadow design**: No autonomous virtual-to-physical interactions (no remote execution risks),
  - **Real-time data validation**: Continuous comparison of simulated vs. measured data to detect anomalies,
  - **Controlled access**: Sensors and data streams are managed by the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller with no remote operation capabilities described. No explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) are mentioned."
]
